title: 2048 Ballz
description: 2048 Ballz - is an endless physics puzzle with 2048 mechanics! You have to combine balls of the same color to get new one! Set a record! Enjoy this beautiful and relaxing game!
instructions: Swipe your finger mouse cursor right and left to move the ball and release Combine balls with the same numbers to get a larger ones The bigger the balls the higher your score The game ends when the field is filled up to the dotted line
